default.title: I-Horizon Tech | Isoftware yeShishini, ilifu, kunye ne-AI
default.description: I-Horizon Tech iyila kwaye ihambisa isoftware yeshishini, izisombululo ze-AI, iziseko zelifu, kunye neemveliso zedijithali kumaqela amabhongo.

home.title: I-Horizon Tech | Iinkqubo zobunjineli ezilinganisa
home.description: Isoftware yeshishini, i-AI / ML, iziseko zophuhliso zelifu, kunye nokuhanjiswa kwe-IoT kumaqela ehlabathi.

about.title: Malunga ne-Horizon Tech | Umsebenzi weNkampani kunye neQela
about.description: Funda malunga ne-Horizon Tech, umsebenzi wethu, kunye nendlela esihambisa ngayo izisombululo zetekhnoloji ephezulu.

team.title: Iqela | Ubunkokheli be-Horizon Tech kunye neengcali
team.description: Dibana neenjineli kunye neenkokheli ezakha isoftware yeshishini kunye namaqonga effu kwi-Horizon Tech.

careers.title: Imisebenzi | Yakha nge-Horizon Tech
careers.description: Phonononga iindima ezivulekileyo kwaye ukhulise ikhondo lakho lomsebenzi kunye neqela lobunjineli le-Horizon Tech.

contact.title: Qhagamshelana neHorizon Tech | Qala iprojekthi yakho
contact.description: Nxibelelana ne-Horizon Tech ukuze uxoxe ngeprojekthi yakho, iimfuno zobuchwephesha, kunye nexesha lokuhambisa.

caseStudies.title: Izifundo zeTyala | Iziphumo ze-Horizon Tech
caseStudies.description: Funda izifundo zamatyala abathengi kunye neziphumo ezinikezelwa yiHorizon Tech kuwo onke amashishini.

blog.title: Ibhlog | I-Horizon Tech Insights
blog.description: Ulwazi lobuchwephesha, izifundo zokuhanjiswa, kunye nesikhokelo sokwakha esivela kwi-Horizon Tech.

education.title: Imfundo | Izibonelelo zokuFunda zeHorizon Tech
education.description: Izikhokelo, iimbekiselo, kunye nezixhobo zokufunda zobuchwephesha ezivela kwi-Horizon Tech.

support.title: Inkxaso | I-Horizon Tech
support.description: Fumana izibonelelo zenkxaso kunye neendlela zonxibelelwano kwiinkonzo ze-Horizon Tech.

privacy.title: Umgaqo-nkqubo wabucala | I-Horizon Tech
privacy.description: Funda umgaqo-nkqubo wabucala we-Horizon Tech kunye nezibophelelo zokukhuselwa kwedatha.

terms.title: Imigaqo yeNkonzo | I-Horizon Tech
terms.description: Funda imigaqo yenkonzo ye-Horizon Tech kwiwebhusayithi yethu kunye neenkonzo.

profile.title: Iprofayile | I-Horizon Tech
profile.description: Lawula iprofayile yakho ye-Horizon Tech, useto kunye neenkcukacha zeakhawunti.

firstTimeSetup.title: Ukuseta kwexesha lokuqala | I-Horizon Tech
firstTimeSetup.description: Gqibezela ukuseta iakhawunti yexesha lokuqala ukuze uqhubeke kwi-Horizon Tech.

forgotPassword.title: Ilibale Igama eligqithisiweyo | I-Horizon Tech
forgotPassword.description: Buyisela kwakhona ukufikelela kwiakhawunti yakho ye-Horizon Tech.

resetPassword.title: Misela kwakhona igama eligqithisiweyo | I-Horizon Tech
resetPassword.description: Yenza iphasiwedi entsha yeakhawunti yakho ye-Horizon Tech.

confirmEmail.title: Qinisekisa i-imeyile | I-Horizon Tech
confirmEmail.description: Qinisekisa idilesi yakho ye-imeyile ukuze usebenze iakhawunti yakho ye-Horizon Tech.

admin.title: Iphaneli yoLawulo | I-Horizon Tech
admin.description: Indawo yokusebenzela yolawulo lweqonga le-Horizon Tech.

unauthorized.title: Engagunyaziswanga | I-Horizon Tech
unauthorized.description: Okwangoku awukwazi ukufikelela kweli phepha le-Horizon Tech.

services.title: Iinkonzo | I-Horizon Tech
services.description: Phonononga iinkonzo ze-Horizon Tech kubunjineli besoftware, i-AI, ilifu, i-DevOps, kunye nenguqu yedijithali.

innovationLab.title: ILebhu ye-Innovation | I-Horizon Tech
innovationLab.description: Jonga iimvavanyo ze-Horizon Tech kunye neeprototypes kwi-AI kunye nobunjineli obusetyenzisiweyo.

authCallback.title: Ukungena | I-Horizon Tech
authCallback.description: Ukugqibezela ukungena okukhuselekileyo kwiakhawunti yakho ye-Horizon Tech.
